title: CheckRequest
description: Request body for POST /check - check a text for grammar and style issues

text.description: The text to be checked. This or 'data' is required.

data.description: The text to be checked, given as a JSON document that specifies what's text and what's markup. This or 'text' is required.

language.description: A language code like 'en-US', 'de-DE', 'fr', or 'auto' to guess the language automatically.

username.description: Your username/email for Premium API access.

apiKey.description: Your API key for Premium API access.

dicts.description: Comma-separated list of dictionaries to include words from.

motherTongue.description: A language code of the user's native language, enabling false friends checks.

preferredVariants.description: Comma-separated list of preferred language variants, used with language=auto.

enabledRules.description: IDs of rules to be enabled, comma-separated.

disabledRules.description: IDs of rules to be disabled, comma-separated.

enabledCategories.description: IDs of categories to be enabled, comma-separated.

disabledCategories.description: IDs of categories to be disabled, comma-separated.

enabledOnly.description: If true, only the rules and categories specified with enabledRules or enabledCategories are enabled.

level.description: If set to 'picky', additional rules will be activated for formal text checking.
